title: Luminexus
body:
# 🎮 **Luminexus Enhanced Experience Modpack** 🎮

Take your survival gameplay to the next level with our **client-side modpack** designed to improve performance, visuals, and overall experience on the Luminexus server!

### This modpack includes:

- ⚙️ **Performance Boosts**: Enjoy smoother gameplay with FPS optimization mods.
- 🎨 **Visual Enhancements**: Improved textures, shaders, and UI tweaks for a more immersive world.
- 🔍 **Quality of Life Add-ons**: Minimap, better HUD, and other tools to enhance your survival adventures.

💡 **Note**: This modpack is **optional** and fully compatible with vanilla gameplay.
